hackathons.name: Tableau Hackathon
hackathons.description: AMR Sentinel is an AI-powered Tableau Next platform that proactively detects emerging antimicrobial resistance threats using phenotypic surveillance data and delivers actionable recommendations to pharmaceutical teams. It de-risks drug development, accelerates regulatory compliance, and enables real-time, automated responses through Slack and Salesforce integration.

hackathons.name: Techsavvy Hackathon
hackathons.description: An end-to-end cybersecurity solution focused on data and privacy protection. The project features a React-based dashboard, browser extensions for real-time email parsing and HTML data extraction, and a robust Django/FastAPI backend. It integrates machine learning models with open-source intelligence from PhishTank and OpenPhish to provide high-accuracy risk scores and detailed reporting on malicious URLs and emails.
